heading: What I can do for you.
sub: Video editing, virtual assistance, and web development. End-to-end, remote-ready, and built around your workflow.

items.title: Video Editing
items.desc: High-retention edits in Premiere Pro & After Effects. From short-form content to full promotional videos. Paced to keep audiences watching.

items.title: Virtual Assistant
items.desc: Administrative support, calendar & email management, internet research, documentation, digital asset organization, and project coordination. Remote, reliable, and across time zones.

items.title: Content Operations
items.desc: Managing your full production pipeline: content calendars, publishing schedules, performance tracking, and cross-platform social media management.

items.title: Web Development
items.desc: Full-stack web development using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Node.js, Express, and MySQL. From landing pages to full web applications, built clean and shipped.

samples: Delivered a commissioned edit for U.S. recording artist Gracie Abrams that reached 3.9M views and 270K likes natively.
Managed a two-part commissioned edit series end-to-end — requirements gathering, 24-hour delivery, and client handoff.
Built and contributed to the MSC NU Laguna official website backend using Node.js, Express, and MySQL.
Grew ERO | VISUALS to 124M+ cumulative views across platforms, 96%+ of reach from non-follower discovery.
note: Open to additional tasks beyond this list.
